Lyvely’s Claim is Live.
Everyone can Claim their Tokens.
For Free.

Lyvely’s Monetization Features Are
Available To Everyone,
For Free.

Connect Wallet to Claim now directly to your wallet

If you are a creator, coach, artist, or entertainer, offering a content membership is the ideal way for you to generate recurring revenue each month. We’ve designed the easiest and most efficient way for you to launch your content membership, simply by creating a Lyvely profile.

With every post that you publish on Lyvely, be it an image, a video upload or PDF upload, you have the choice to select who can access this post, for example,  “Members Only”.

Members only posts will appear on Lyvely’s global newsfeed for you to get discovered by new paying customers, but it will appear as “locked content”, accessible only by your paying Members.

CLAIM TOKEN

Paid Community

When it comes to building an online business, community = currency. Building a community is key to your success, enabling you to promote your products/services and convert fans to paying customers.

When it comes to building an online business, community = currency. Building a community is key to your success, enabling you to promote your products/services and convert fans to paying customers.

By directing your fans and followers towards joining your community, you create a growing customer base and a flywheel effect that results in your community engaging with each other, which generates content and dialogue without you having to create it. This is the path to you becoming more than just a creator- it’s the way to become a brand and build a sustainable business.

Read More

Pay to View

Charging a fee to access content from your Lyvely profile is one of the simplest ways to turn your creations into cash. With Lyvely, all you have to do is make a post and select “Pay To View”, then set the price to charge people to access it. It’s that easy.

Charging a fee to access content from your Lyvely profile is one of the simplest ways to turn your creations into cash. With Lyvely, all you have to do is make a post and select “Pay To View”, then set the price to charge people to access it. It’s that easy.

From coaches uploading training videos and courses, personal trainers and nutritionists uploading meals plans and exercise programs, or content creators and entertainers uploading tutorials or behind the scene videos, you can do it all with Lyvely. And it’s a simple as making a post!

If you have great video content that you’ve previously posted on YouTube for free, or training programs that you tried to sell on other sites that you want to re-purpose, post it on Lyvely. Good content never gets old. You should capitalize from the time and effort you invested making it, so post it on Lyvely as a Pay To View, and start earning from content that you have already created.

For more details on our Pay To View feature, check out this video.

Read More

Lyve Stream & Selling

Products and services don’t just sell themselves. You have to promote and advertise in order to get people’s attention and make a sale. Nothing gets more attention than live interactions, which is why we’ve created our innovative Lyve stream feature with a built-in shopping function.

Products and services don’t just sell themselves. You have to promote and advertise in order to get people’s attention and make a sale. Nothing gets more attention than live interactions, which is why we’ve created our innovative Lyve stream feature with a built-in shopping function.

If you host live AMA’s, workshops, seminars, or if you want to promote a product, affiliate link, or service (or even your own content) via a live stream, our Lyve streaming feature is exactly what you need. All you have to do is go live or schedule a live event, then add a URL to whatever you want to promote. Boom. You’re selling live, in-stream. And anyone in the world who is watching you can purchase from you, with just one click.

Our Lyve stream feature converts the URL into an clickable item for you, and displays it in your stream as a product for your viewers. It’s live selling at it’s best, and the highest converting sales method that engages your audience.
It gets even better. We promote your Lyve stream to our global community, helping you get even more attention and paying viewers!

Read More

Video Calls

Lyvely is a game-changer for coaches and consultants who works with clients online. Forget using Zoom or Google Meets to host your sessions, and PayPal or other 3rd party apps to invoice and get paid. Now you can do everything from scheduling, hosting your video call, payments and marketing, all with your Lyvely profile.

Lyvely is a game-changer for coaches and consultants who works with clients online. Forget using Zoom or Google Meets to host your sessions, and PayPal or other 3rd party apps to invoice and get paid. Now you can do everything from scheduling, hosting your video call, payments and marketing, all with your Lyvely profile.

Creating a service on Lyvely is as simple as making a post, providing you with streamlined user experience that allows you focus more on growing your business and reaching new clients.

By creating a service on your Lyvely profile, anyone from around the world who visits your page or sees your post in Lyvely’s feed will see that you offer a coaching or consulting service. This puts you on a global stage in front of people who are finding you on Lyvely because they are actually interested in paying for what you have to offer, not just mindlessly scrolling short form content.

Read More

Tips

With Lyvely, expressing gratitude is a part of our philosophy and life’s mission to pay it forward. That’s why we’ve created our Grateful feature, which is designed to help you receive tips from your fans and community, or anyone who wants to show their gratitude.

With Lyvely, expressing gratitude is a part of our philosophy and life’s mission to pay it forward. That’s why we’ve created our Grateful feature, which is designed to help you receive tips from your fans and community, or anyone who wants to show their gratitude.

You’d be amazed at how many people want to give you something in return for all the valuable content you’re shared that has educated, entertained, or empowered them along their journey.

They want to give you something to say thank you, and Lyvely’s here to help you receive!

To activate the Grateful feature on your Lyvely profile, simply visit your account settings to set up to 3 tiers of tips (For example, $5, $20, $50) and you’re ready to start receiving!

Read More
Get Lyvely

FAQs

Learn more about Lyvely

Is Lyvely free?
We want to live in a world where more people follow their passion and get paid for doing what they love. This is why we created Lyvely, and this is why Lyvely is free to use, for everyone.

However as a business, we have to generate revenue. Since we strongly oppose Big Tech’s #1 revenue stream (selling your data), we’ve created a simple fee structure that applies to transactions on Lyvely. To put it simply, we only make money when you make money. Period. When you sell something via your Lyvely profile, we take a 20% fee.

To reduce this fee and get even more benefits, you can upgrade to Lyvely Pro.
What is Lyvely Pro?
 Lyvely Pro is an upgraded tier that gives you reduced platform fees (10%) and increased benefits, such as unlimited video calls and live stream duration, as well as a Pro verified account.

Lyvely Pro is ideal for established creators, coaches or online brands with existing communities who are already generating revenue online from their content or services.
Can I change tiers?
Absolutely. You can upgrade or downgrade your plan at any time with just a few clicks. No stress.
How can I start making money on Lyvely?
As soon as you connect your bank account to your Lyvely page (which you can do anytime via your Lyvely profile) you’re ready to start earning.

The best way to get things rolling is to make an announcement on your other social profiles and send your fans and followers over to your Lyvely page, where they can instantly purchase content or services from you, or you can prompt them to subscribe to your community and become a member of your page. And don’t forget- every time you post on Lyvely, we broadcast your post in our global feed, where you can get discovered by new fans and paying clients. What are you waiting for! Start posting and earning on Lyvely, today.
Do I need to have a registered business to get paid?
Nope. We make it simple for anyone in the world to monetize on Lyvely. You do not need to have a registered business to monnetize or accept payments on your Lyvely profile. All you need is a personal bank account, and our payment partners make it possible for you to accept credit card payments from customers all around the world.
How do I get paid?
It’s simple! The money you make on Lyvely will be directly deposited into your bank account. Payouts are typically 2x/month, but you can customize your payouts to whatever frequency you wish.
